extraction_contract: Use the PDF/AIP section as the source of truth for expected values.
Extract field-value pairs exactly at the documentary field level shown by the AIP.
Do not split a documented field into semantic subfields such as meters/feet, Spanish/English variants, coordinates, phones or temperatures unless the source presents them as separate fields.
Use tables[] only when the source presents repeated rows/columns; table columns must be the documentary column headings.
Preserve NIL, No, blank/null cells and bilingual values as the cell or field value.

fields.label: PENETRACION DE LA SUPERFICIE DEL TRAMO VISUAL (VSS) / VISUAL SEGMENT SURFACE (VSS) PENETRATION
